films.title: Chickenhare and the Secret of the Groundhog
films.description: The film was produced by Belgium's nWave Digital and France's Octopolis, in association with Sony Pictures Releasing. World Premiere at Annecy International Film Festival.

films.description: The film was produced by Belgium's nWave Digital and France's Octopolis, in association with Spain's A Contracorriente Films. World Premiere at Annecy International Film Festival.

films.distribution: Belga Films (Benelux) / Sony Pictures Releasing / Netflix (International) / Lionsgate (USA)

films.description: The film was produced by Belgium's nWave Digital and France's Octopolis. World Premiere at Annecy International Film Festival.
films.distribution: Belga Films (Benelux) / Apollo Films / TF1 Studio (France) / Netflix (International)

films.title: The Queen's Corgi
films.description: The film was produced by nWave Pictures (Brussels, Belgium). World Premiere at L'Alpe d'Huez International Comedy Film Festival.

films.title: The Son of Bigfoot
films.description: The film was produced by Belgium's nWave Digital and France's StudioCanal. World Premiere at Annecy International Film Festival.

films.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
films.description: The film was co-produced by the Hollywood studio DreamWorks and Oriental DreamWorks, a Shanghai-based joint venture between DreamWorks and Chinese partners. It marked the first time a U.S.-led feature film was co-produced with China, and the film held its world premiere in China.

films.title: How to Train Your Dragon: Dragons - Dawn of the Dragon Racers
films.description: The series was produced by DreamWorks in collaboration with Oriental DreamWorks.

films.description: The series was produced by DreamWorks in collaboration with Oriental DreamWorks.
